name: Eggsquisite Easter Baskets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix peanut butter and butterscotch chips over low heat or place in microwave until melted.
2. Add shredded wheat to the mixture.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
4. Mold the mixture into baskets using the back of a spoon.
5. Place the baskets in the refrigerator to set.
6. Fill nests with Easter eggs and/or candy. Little nests filled with jellybeans are delightful.
